sessionStart.comment: Check for legacy installations and log session start

sessionStart.prompt: You have superpowers skills installed. Before responding to ANY task, check if a skill applies by reviewing your available skills. If there is even a 1% chance a skill is relevant, use it. Skills determine HOW to approach work — brainstorming before building, debugging before fixing, TDD before coding. Run /skills list if unsure what's available.

preToolUse.comment: Safety check: deny destructive operations on main branch without confirmation

errorOccurred.comment: Log errors for systematic-debugging skill context
